evals.prompt: I need to create a new Drupal module called event_analytics for tracking event attendance on a Drupal 10 site. It should depend on the node module and be part of a custom 'Events' package. Set it up so I can start adding services and controllers to it. We're running Drupal 10 but want D11 compatibility.
evals.expected_output: A complete Drupal module scaffold with .info.yml, .module file, and src/ directory following PSR-4 conventions
expectations: event_analytics.info.yml contains core_version_requirement with BOTH ^10 AND ^11: '^10 || ^11' (NOT just '^10', NOT 'core: 8.x')
Dependencies listed in 'drupal:node' format (NOT bare 'node' without the drupal: prefix)
.module file only created if hooks are actually needed (NOT an empty .module file with no hooks)
All PHP classes are in src/ directory following PSR-4 (NOT in the module root)
.info.yml has 'type: module' (required in D10+, was optional in D8)
The module enables successfully: ddev drush en event_analytics returns exit code 0
